case.title: KASHARIAN v. SOUTH PLAINFIELD BAPTIST CHURCH

opinion.h1: KASHARIAN v. SOUTH PLAINFIELD BAPTIST CHURCH, 382 U.S. 40 (1965)
opinion.h4: KASHARIAN ET AL. v. SOUTH PLAINFIELD BAPTIST CHURCH ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 433, Misc. Decided October 18, 1965.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction.
opinion.h4: NATIONAL TRAILER CONVOY, INC. v. UNITED STATES, 382 U.S. 40 (1965)
opinion.p: 382 U.S. 40 NATIONAL TRAILER CONVOY, INC. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF OKLAHOMA. No. 373. Decided October 18, 1965.
Jack N. Hays and Harold G. Hernly for appellant.
Acting Solicitor General Spritzer, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Robert B. Hummel, Robert W. Ginnane and Thomas H. Ploss for the United States et al.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
